name: Optional Calendly booking
duration: Replace with your own event link
teaser: Turn this on when you want a booking link on the page. Replace the placeholder with your own Calendly event URL after you sign up.

name: 可选的 Calendly 预约入口
duration: 替换成你自己的活动链接
teaser: 当你准备好展示预约入口时，再启用这一项。把这里的占位链接换成你自己的 Calendly 活动链接即可。
